meanings.usage: 指从沉船或废墟中救出财物
指船上的所有工作人员
指国家的主体部分，不包括岛屿
指未经加工的贵重金属
指用工具或方法仔细搜寻某区域
形容规模或程度非常大
常用复数形式，指个人物品
指一起旅行或被护送的船队或车队
记录船舶航行情况的日志
指能在水下航行的船只
sink的过去分词作形容词用
指将零散的信息拼凑成完整画面

examples.en: The captain was instructed to give up the search.
There was tremendous excitement on board.
The crew were at first under the impression that the lost ship had been found.
examples.zh: 船员们最初以为找到了那艘失踪的船。

examples.en: The numerous items were brought to the surface.
The captain was able to piece together all the information.
examples.zh: 船长能够拼凑出所有的信息。

examples.en: Information that had come to light was collected.
examples.zh: 被揭露的信息被收集起来。

examples.en: The captain of the Elkor ordered his men to salvage as much as possible.
examples.zh: 埃尔科号船长命令他的手下尽可能多地打捞。

examples.en: Elkor had been searching the Barents Sea for weeks.
examples.zh: 埃尔科号已经在巴伦支海搜索了数周。

examples.en: What they had in fact found was a ship which had been sunk many years before.
examples.zh: 他们实际上发现的是一艘很多年前沉没的船。

examples.en: This was later confirmed by a naval official.
examples.zh: 这后来被一位海军官员证实。

grammar.title: 过去完成进行时 (Past Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经开始并持续到该时刻的动作，或刚刚结束的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述持续进行的动作，常与for/during等时间词连用，强调动作的持续性

examples.en: Elkor had been searching the Barents Sea for weeks.
examples.zh: 埃尔科号已经在巴伦支海搜索了数周。

grammar.title: 过去完成时被动态 (Past Perfect Passive)
grammar.definition: 过去完成时的被动语态，表示在过去某时刻之前已经完成且承受动作的主语
grammar.usage: 强调动作的完成性和被动性，主语是动作的承受者

examples.en: The sunken ship he was trying to find had been carrying a precious cargo of gold bullion.
examples.zh: 他试图寻找的沉船一直载有贵重的金条。

original.en: The sea bed was scoured with powerful nets and there was tremendous excitement on board when a chest was raised from the bottom.
original.zh: 用强力网搜寻海底，当一个箱子从海底被吊起时，船上非常兴奋。

imitations.en: The police had been searching the area for hours when they finally found the missing child.
imitations.zh: 警察在该地区搜索了几个小时，终于找到了失踪的孩子。

original.en: Despite the message, the captain of the Elkor decided to try once more.
original.zh: 尽管收到了消息，埃尔科号的船长决定再试一次。

imitations.en: Despite the heavy rain, we continued our journey.
imitations.zh: 尽管下着大雨，我们继续赶路。

original.en: The captain learnt from the letter that the name of the lost ship was the Karen.
original.zh: 船长从信中得知失踪船只的名字是凯伦号。

imitations.en: The detective realized that the suspect had been lying.
imitations.zh: 侦探意识到嫌疑人一直在撒谎。

original.en: The Karen had been sailing in a convoy to Russia when she was torpedoed by an enemy submarine.
original.zh: 凯伦号正在护航队中驶向俄罗斯时被敌方潜艇发射鱼雷击中。

imitations.en: He had been driving for three hours when his car broke down.
imitations.zh: 他已经开了三个小时的车，这时他的车抛锚了。
